bird.name: 薩帕塔鵐
bird.summary: 薩帕塔鵐（學名：Torreornis inexpectata）是雀鵐科下一種鳥類，牠們是中等大小的，羽毛顏色呈灰黃色，冠羽為較暗的灰紅色，上體混橄欖綠和灰色，是古巴的特有種，棲息在薩帕塔沼澤的草原及附近地區，體長約 16.5公分（6.5英寸），已知有三個亞種。 牠們已知的威脅有…

relations.subject: 薩帕塔鵐
relations.evidence: varonai | range_map = Torreornis inexpectata map.svg }} The Zapata sparrow (Torreornis inexpectata) is a medium-sized grey and yellow bird that lives in the grasslands of the Zapata Swamp and elsewhere on the island of Cuba
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 薩帕塔鵐
relations.evidence: varonai | range_map = Torreornis inexpectata map.svg }} The Zapata sparrow (Torreornis inexpectata) is a medium-sized grey and yellow bird that lives in the grasslands of the Zapata Swamp and elsewhere on the island of Cuba
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 薩帕塔鵐
relations.evidence: Typical threats are wildfires in the dry season, drainage of wetlands, and destruction of habitat due to agriculture and tourism
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
